info.title: Apicurio Axiom API
info.description: REST API for the Apicurio Axiom event-driven project orchestration platform.

parameters.name: filterName
parameters.description: Substring filter on project name or issue reference

parameters.name: filterStatus
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of status values to include

get.summary: List conversation thread entries for a project

200.description: List of events related to this project

get.summary: List tasks assigned to an actor (paginated)

parameters.name: filterActionType
parameters.description: Filter by action type name (substring match)

parameters.name: filterStatus
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of task statuses to include

200.description: Paginated list of tasks assigned to this actor

get.summary: Get an action type by ID

parameters.name: filterEntryType
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of entry types to include

200.description: Paginated list of activity log entries

post.description: Receives GitHub webhook payloads, validates the HMAC-SHA256 signature, normalizes the event, and enqueues it for processing.

get.summary: Get the execution log for an activity entry
get.description: Returns the detailed execution log stored in the activity entry's details field.

404.description: Activity entry not found or no log available

post.summary: Evaluate an event with the AI Manager (debug)
post.description: Invokes the AI Manager to evaluate a specific event and return its decisions. This is a debug/testing endpoint — in production, events are evaluated automatically via the pipeline.

post.summary: Submit a human response to a task
post.description: Submits a user response for a task that is awaiting human input.

404.description: Task not found or not awaiting input

get.summary: Get the execution log for a task
get.description: Returns the human-readable execution transcript for a completed or failed task.

404.description: Task not found or no log available

get.summary: Get a tool definition by ID
List tools associated with an action type

200.description: List of tools for this action type

put.summary: Set the tools associated with an action type
put.description: Replaces the full list of tool associations for this action type. Pass an array of tool definition IDs.

eventId.description: Originating event ID (correlation ID for tracing)

allowedTools.description: Tools the actor is allowed to use when performing this action

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template sent to the AI agent when executing this action type. Supports placeholders: {{managerInput}}, {{issueRef}}, {{repository}}, {{projectName}}, {{issueTitle}}

allowedTools.description: Tools the actor is allowed to use when performing this action

promptTemplate.description: Prompt template sent to the AI agent when executing this action type. Supports placeholders: {{managerInput}}, {{issueRef}}, {{repository}}, {{projectName}}, {{issueTitle}}

pollingEnabled.description: Whether polling is enabled for this repository
Whether polling is enabled for this repository
